name: Genesis Minerals Limited
description: Genesis Minerals Limited is an Australian gold exploration and development company focused on the Leonora Gold District in Western Australia. The company is dedicated to creating a premium Australian gold business through strategic acquisitions, exploration, and development of high-quality gold assets, including the Leonora Operations and the Mt Magnet project. Genesis aims to deliver sustainable growth and value to its shareholders by leveraging its experienced management team and high-grade resource base.
